app.name: Korbo's Donut Shop
app.long_description:
Korbo's world-famous* donut shop is always open!
*Donut shop may or may not actually be world-famous. None of this would have ever happened without "Wii Donut" by emilydaemon, and xOx-Liy-Codez-XD-oXo helped me a ton getting this to initially work.
GBA Donut requires a GBA link cable plugged in the 4th controller port.
Music can be changed by adding a "music.(mod/it/s3m/xm/whatever)" file in the app directory. This program supports *most* tracker music formats. https://modarchive.org is a good source.
e-mail: Korbo: korbin.m.marshall@gmail.com
The default background song is "Addiction" by Jogeir Liljedahl.
